title: Incorrect results in SQL set operators INTERSECT and EXCEPT
poc: SELECT * FROM ((SELECT * FROM S) INTERSECT (SELECT * FROM R)) as inter;
SELECT count(*) FROM ((SELECT * FROM S) INTERSECT (SELECT * FROM R)) as inter;
SELECT * FROM ((SELECT * FROM S) EXCEPT (SELECT * FROM R)) as diff;
SELECT count(*) FROM ((SELECT * FROM S) EXCEPT (SELECT * FROM R)) as diff;
SELECT inter.u FROM ((SELECT * FROM S) INTERSECT (SELECT * FROM R)) as inter;
SELECT u FROM ((SELECT * FROM S) EXCEPT (SELECT * FROM R)) as diff;
SELECT diff.u FROM ((SELECT * FROM S) EXCEPT (SELECT * FROM R)) as diff;
alter table r drop column r;
alter table s drop column r;
alter table r drop column v;
alter table s drop column v;
SELECT u FROM ((SELECT * FROM S) INTERSECT (SELECT * FROM R)) as inter;
SELECT u FROM ((SELECT * FROM R) INTERSECT (SELECT * FROM S)) as inter;
key_bug_features: Incorrect results from SQL INTERSECT and EXCEPT operations
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "sys"."t" ("a" INTEGER NOT NULL, "b" VARCHAR(50), "c" DATE);
CREATE TABLE "sys"."u" ("x" INTEGER NOT NULL, "y" FLOAT, "z" BOOLEAN);
SELECT * FROM ((SELECT * FROM t) INTERSECT (SELECT * FROM u)) AS result;
